form.formComment: Won again in quick time after leading to make it back-to-back wins at this track over 366m (19.92). Has the ability and should feature again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in quick time after leading to make it back-to-back wins at this track over 366m (19.92). Has the ability and should feature again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on March 31 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Daytona Sunset beaten 4 lengths (25.93) in a Restricted WIN. More than capable and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on March 31 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Daytona Sunset beaten 4 lengths (25.93) in a Restricted WIN. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Cashed Up Rhi at this track last start over 366m (20.43). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (16.86) over 300m at Q Straight. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (16.86) over 300m at Q Straight. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (20.12) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Happy to risk in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (20.12) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Happy to risk in this.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 350m at Q Straight. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 350m at Q Straight. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Placed last time (29.99) at Q Parklands in a Restricted WIN, finishing second and beaten one length. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (29.99) at Q Parklands in a Restricted WIN, finishing second and beaten one length. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. Looks suited and should go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Into the 1st turn made heavy contact with the running rail.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on February 1 at this track over 366m. Last start was fourth over 520m in 30.06, behind Specifically. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.
